personality: 5 Brutalist Mobile structure (Light) with 7 Utility operational layouts
personality_one_liner: A high-visibility, operational command center built for speed, contrast, and outdoor legibility.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing for outdoor usage. High tap-target clearance.

do's: Use solid surfaceSecondary and surfaceInverse for elevated components to ensure maximum contrast and legibility under sunlight.
dont's: No blur or glassmorphism. This is a fast, operational rider app running on diverse Android devices.

screens.name: Splash & Auth
screens.purpose: High-impact brand entry and fast phone/OTP login.

states.error: Inline text or toast with retry.

screens.layout: Centered FoodNova logo. Phone number input with massive, full-width sticky submit button at the bottom.

screens.name: Onboarding (KYC)
screens.purpose: Frictionless multi-step document collection (Selfie, ID, Vehicle).

states.error: Red borderStrong on missing/failed document upload.

screens.layout: Progress bar at top. Clear, single-column upload zones. Large 'Next' button pinned above keyboard.

screens.name: Dashboard (Home)
screens.purpose: Primary operational hub to go online, view earnings, and accept incoming offers.

states.empty: Offline state: Map is grayed out or shows 'You are offline'.
states.error: Banner at top if GPS/Network fails.

screens.layout: Map background occupying upper 60%. Bottom 40% houses a sticky surface container with Earnings overview and a massive 'Swipe to Go Online' or primary toggle button. Incoming offer pops up as an edge-to-edge bottom sheet with a countdown ring.

screens.name: Active Delivery (Live)
screens.purpose: Step-by-step navigation and status tracking for the current order.
screens.layout: Full-screen map. Persistent bottom sheet detailing current step (e.g., 'Head to Restaurant', 'Confirm Pickup'). Large slider/button to transition states. Essential details (Customer name, Order #, PIN) presented in high-contrast typography.

screens.name: Deliveries & Earnings

states.error: Failed to load data, tap to retry.

screens.layout: Large numeric metrics at the top. Filter pills (Today, Week). Flat list of delivery cards with strict structural borders.

screens.name: Profile & Settings
screens.purpose: Rider documents, vehicle info, and app preferences.
screens.layout: Standard single-column list with structural dividers. High-visibility 'Log Out' action at the bottom.

login_hero.alt: Food delivery driver on a scooter

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: FoodNova Green (#00C261) is the primary signal color. Charcoal (#111827 / #1F2937) provides high-contrast structure. Do not introduce any blue or purple.
Typography: Use Space Grotesk for large numeric metrics and primary headings. Use Plus Jakarta Sans for high legibility in body/UI elements.
Layout: Optimize for driver motion. Primary actions (Go Online, Accept Offer, Confirm Pickup) must be massively scaled (min 56pt height, often full width) and pinned to the bottom (thumb zone).
Disable glassmorphism completely. Rely on solid surfaceInverse or surfaceSecondary containers for maximum visibility under direct sunlight (Brutalist Utility approach).
For the active delivery screen, ensure a clear timeline/step approach. Avoid burying the delivery PIN or customer contact info.
Implement haptics prominently on status toggles (e.g., 'Go Online', 'Confirm Dropoff') to give physical feedback while driving.
